/usr/bin/ar qc libleo_api_lib.a  CMakeFiles/leo_api_lib.dir/audio/audio_decode.c.o CMakeFiles/leo_api_lib.dir/audio/audio_input.c.o CMakeFiles/leo_api_lib.dir/audio/audio_output.c.o CMakeFiles/leo_api_lib.dir/gpio/leo_gpio.c.o CMakeFiles/leo_api_lib.dir/gpio/leo_key.c.o CMakeFiles/leo_api_lib.dir/network/network_audio_package.c.o CMakeFiles/leo_api_lib.dir/network/network_common.c.o CMakeFiles/leo_api_lib.dir/network/network_mac.c.o CMakeFiles/leo_api_lib.dir/network/network_outdoor_upgrade.c.o CMakeFiles/leo_api_lib.dir/network/network_video_package.c.o CMakeFiles/leo_api_lib.dir/network/testRTSPClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/leo_api_lib.dir/png_lib/lodepng.c.o CMakeFiles/leo_api_lib.dir/png_lib/lv_png.c.o CMakeFiles/leo_api_lib.dir/queue/queue.c.o CMakeFiles/leo_api_lib.dir/queue/ring_buffer.c.o CMakeFiles/leo_api_lib.dir/samplerate/samplerate.c.o CMakeFiles/leo_api_lib.dir/samplerate/samplerate_api.c.o CMakeFiles/leo_api_lib.dir/samplerate/src_linear.c.o CMakeFiles/leo_api_lib.dir/samplerate/src_sinc.c.o CMakeFiles/leo_api_lib.dir/samplerate/src_zoh.c.o CMakeFiles/leo_api_lib.dir/video/avilib.c.o CMakeFiles/leo_api_lib.dir/video/jpeg_record.c.o CMakeFiles/leo_api_lib.dir/video/media_thumb.c.o CMakeFiles/leo_api_lib.dir/xls/tuya_uuid_and_key.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libleo_api_lib.a
